title: Retrieving automation's recipe mapping for specific account

posts.author: eyalos (Eyal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

For debugging and support reasons, I came across a need to check specific account’s recipe values.
Let’s say I wrote an app with a sentence builder feature, which has a recipe.
A user installs the app and configure his/her recipe place holders with relevant values.
I would like to get the configuration of this specific install (i.e. the specific values he/she configured).

Is this something that exists and I wasn’t aware of?
If not, would be very helpful for all of us app builders.

Thanks!

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @eyalos, how’s it going?
Its not exist and not supported yet, but supporting full CRUD via API is in the roadmap.

posts.author: eyalos (Eyal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks!
Looking forward to this, it’ll help with troubleshooting and visibility of the recipe of the app users.
